name: Stir-Fried Shrimp w/ Oyster Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine 2 teaspoons of the oil, the sugar, baking soda, ginger root, 1/4 teaspoon of the cornstarch and salt; add shrimp and toss to mix well. Let stand for 10 minutes.
2. In a small bowl, combine the remaining 1 teaspoon cornstarch, 2 teaspoons water and 2 teaspoons oyster sauce, stirring until cornstarch dissolves. Set aside.
3. In a large nonstick skillet, heat the remaining 2 teaspoons oil. Add the remaining 2 teaspoons oyster sauce and 1/4 teaspoon dried red pepper flakes; stir-fry 15 seconds. Add shrimp mixture and carrots; stir-fry 4 minutes. Add oyster sauce mixture, peas and scallions, stir-fry 3-4 minutes until peas are heated through and shrimp are pink and opaque.
